name: pr-review-agent
description: AI-powered PR review agent using LangChain and OpenRouter

scripts.build: yarn sync-wasm && rm -rf action && tsc && ncc build dist/index.js -o action -e web-tree-sitter && rm -rf action/web-tree-sitter && mkdir -p action/wasm action/node_modules/web-tree-sitter && cp src/helpers/wasm/* action/wasm/ && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/web-tree-sitter.js node_modules/web-tree-sitter/web-tree-sitter.wasm node_modules/web-tree-sitter/package.json action/node_modules/web-tree-sitter/
